prose:
**Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input structure from formaldehyde.xyz, used as-is (single-point, not re-optimized). SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.652 eV, LUMO = −1.783 eV → **gap = 5.870 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap). Integrity: trustworthy. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
